g.text: 岩 性 描 述
Black shale, euxinic, Ni-Mo enrichment layer at base
Siliceous shale, small shelly fossils, barite layers
Massive dolomite, Cloudina, Sinotubulites, δ¹³C plateau ~+4‰
Light grey thick-bedded peritidal dolomite, chert nodules
Black shale, Doushantuo-Pertatataka acritarchs, Shuram δ¹³C nadir −10‰
Grey dolomitic limestone, small acanthomorphs, δ¹³C rising
Pink cap dolomite, tepee structures, barite fans
Ediacaran-Cambrian Chemostratigraphy — South China | 总厚 770m | 10 层 | 比例尺 1:3,031
